expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 用于计算柜体的木板尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 表示总尺寸，[板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván trên, dưới và bên hông, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Pang-itaas, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပုံးအတွက် ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည် ပုံး၏အပေါ်ဆုံး၊ အောက်ဆုံးနှင့် ဘေးဘက်ဘုတ်အသားအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံဘုတ်အသားအထူဖြစ်ပါသည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាប្រវែងបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជាទំហំសរុប [BoardThick] គឺជាភាពក្រាស់នៃគ្រឿងបន្លាស់ផ្នែកលើ ខាងក្រោម និងមួយចំហៀង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាទាបនភាពក្រាស់នៃផ្ទៃខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຄືຂະຫນາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ຄືຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸຂອງບອດເທິງ, ລຸ່ມແລະດ້ານ, [BackBoardThick] ຄືຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸຂອງບອດຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用の板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体寸法、[BoardThick] は上板・底板・側板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背面板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 옆 판재 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las dimensiones totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las placas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la placa trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] correspondent aux dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Bretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke des Hintergrundbretts. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कॅबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार निकालें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
